summary: Business Report and Search Term Report parsing fix verification COMPLETE. All requested features verified: 1) Business Report CSV correctly detects 11 metrics including sessions, pageViews, buyBoxPct, unitSessionPct, 2) Search Term Report XLSX (4,664 rows) correctly detects all 19 PPC metrics including ACOS, ROAS, CTR, CPC, wasted spend, 3) Master Analysis shows Buy Box %, Unit Session %, Traffic analysis for Business Reports, 4) Master Analysis shows ACOS, ROAS, Wasted Spend, CTR for PPC reports, 5) Charts Tab displays with both report types, 6) KPI Cards show Buy Box % when available.
critical_code_review_comments: Column mappings correctly handle en-dash (–) characters in Business Report headers like 'Sessions – Total'
normalizeColumnName function correctly converts en-dash/em-dash to hyphen for matching
detectReportType correctly identifies 'business' type by sessions/pageViews columns
detectReportType correctly identifies 'search_term' type by Customer Search Term column
XLSX parsing working correctly for large files (4,664 rows)
Large file mode correctly enabled for files over 1000 rows
seed_data_creation: Used /tmp/BusinessReport.csv (16 rows Business Report) and /tmp/SearchTermReport.xlsx (4,664 rows Search Term Report)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Business Report and Search Term Report parsing fully working. Business Reports detect: asin, sessions, pageViews, sales, units, orders, unitSessionPct, buyBoxPct, title, parentAsin, childAsin (11 metrics). Search Term Reports detect: sku, searchTerm, targeting, impressions, clicks, sales, units, spend, orders, conversionRate, unitSessionPct, ctr, acos, cpc, roas, date, campaignName, adGroupName, matchType (19 metrics).
